tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS October 2023

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees
payload.description: Key performance metrics document prepared for the October 2023 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
October 2023
This performance metrics document was prepared for the October 2023 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: Nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day, operating 700 trains daily, maintaining 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Replacement of deteriorated timber ties on Spans 13 to 53 of the Moodna Viaduct on Metro-North's Port Jervis Line in Orange County. Contractor will schedule maximum 16 weekend outages.
payload.location: Town of Cornwall, Orange County, on Metro-North's Port Jervis Line

location_normalized.raw_text: Town of Cornwall, Orange County, on Metro-North's Port Jervis Line

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North and MTA Construction & Development are replacing critical infrastructure components on the Moodna Viaduct to repair deteriorated timber ties
The current project includes replacement of the timber ties from Spans 13 to 53. The contractor will schedule a maximum of 16 weekend outages to perform the work

tool_args.label: Atlantic Avenue Tunnel Emergency Exit Hatchway Replacement

payload.project_name: Atlantic Avenue Tunnel Emergency Exit Hatchway Replacement
payload.description: Replacing emergency exit hatchways in the Atlantic Avenue tunnel and performing localized structural repairs. Fifteen emergency exits prioritized, three replaced, four in progress, four more planned for 2025 and 2026.
payload.location: Atlantic Avenue Branch, Brooklyn and Queens

location_normalized.raw_text: Atlantic Avenue Branch, Brooklyn and Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR and MTA Construction & Development are replacing emergency exit hatchways in the Atlantic Avenue tunnel
Three have been replaced, four are currently in progress and four more are planned for replacement in 2025 and 2026.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Renovated Mineola Station with widened platforms, new pedestrian overpasses, improved ADA accessibility, modern amenities. One of the last stations renovated under the Main Line Expansion Project. Station building originally opened September 22, 1923.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Long Island Rail Road and MTA C&D celebrated several achievements at the 'all new' Mineola Station...One of the last stations to be renovated under the Main Line Expansion Project, Mineola now boasts widened platforms, new pedestrian overpasses, improved ADA accessibility, modern amenities

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: NaviLens Pilot at White Plains Station

payload.project_name: NaviLens Pilot at White Plains Station
payload.description: 6-month pilot program of intelligent digital markers that read signs out loud and provide audible train arrival info for blind and low-vision riders. Some 50 QR-type codes installed at White Plains Station.

evidence_refs.source_quote: It's called NaviLens and it's a new system of intelligent digital markers that, when scanned, will read signs out loud and provide audible train arrival info to help blind and low-vision riders navigate the station.
Some 50 colorful QR-type codes have already been installed at our White Plains station, the site of a 6-month pilot program.

tool_args.label: Illuminations Art Installation at Westbury Station

payload.project_name: Illuminations Art Installation at Westbury Station
payload.description: Series of illustrations by New York City artist Darryl Westly titled 'Illuminations' at Westbury LIRR station, spanning the station's ticket office to overpass towers in 782 square feet of painted glass and 140 square feet of metal railings.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Another newly modernized and amenity-packed station is Westbury...unveil a series of gorgeous illustrations by New York City artist Darryl Westly. The series, entitled 'Illuminations'
782 square feet of painted glass
140 square feet of exquisite metal railings

payload.project_name: Atlantic Avenue Tunnel Emergency Exit Hatchway Replacement
payload.description: Replacing emergency exit hatchways in the Atlantic Avenue tunnel and performing localized structural repairs. Fifteen emergency exits prioritized, three replaced, four in progress, four more planned for 2025 and 2026.

location_normalized.raw_text: Atlantic Avenue Branch, Brooklyn and Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR and MTA Construction & Development are replacing emergency exit hatchways in the Atlantic Avenue tunnel and performing localized structural repairs at these points of exits.
Three have been replaced, four are currently in progress and four more are planned for replacement in 2025 and 2026.

payload.description: Renovated Mineola Station with widened platforms, new pedestrian overpasses, improved ADA accessibility, modern amenities. One of the last stations renovated under the Main Line Expansion Project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: One of the last stations to be renovated under the Main Line Expansion Project, Mineola now boasts widened platforms, new pedestrian overpasses, improved ADA accessibility, modern amenities and stunning new art for residents to enjoy.

tool_args.label: September 29, 2023 Heavy Rainfall and Flash Floods

payload.description: Heavy rainfall and flash floods throughout New York metropolitan region snarled commuter rail service. Metro-North service suspended, LIRR delays and temporary service suspensions on Far Rockaway and Long Beach branches.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On September 29, heavy rainfall and flash floods throughout the New York metropolitan region snarled commuter rail service.

payload.description: Hudson Valley Restaurant Week featuring over 140 restaurants with fixed price lunches and dinners, running from October 30 to November 12.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Hudson Valley Restaurant Week features over 140 restaurants with fixed price lunches and dinners...Fall's Hudson Valley Restaurant Week runs from October 30 to November 12.

payload.description: Metro-North restores half-hourly weekend morning trains and afternoon/early-evening trains between Poughkeepsie and Grand Central. Changes also to New Haven Line trains serving Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On October 29, Metro-North will restore several half-hourly weekend morning trains and afternoon and early-evening trains between Poughkeepsie and Grand Central
Also effective October 29 will be changes to New Haven Line trains

payload.description: LIRR schedule changes including two additional through trains to Atlantic Terminal in AM peak, more AM peak express Port Washington Branch service, one afternoon Babylon Branch train to operate Monday-Friday.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Our upcoming November 13 schedule changes continue that practice. Highlights include two additional through trains to Atlantic Terminal in the AM peak, more AM peak express Port Washington Branch service, and one afternoon Babylon Branch train

payload.description: Hudson Valley Restaurant Week featuring over 140 restaurants with fixed price lunches and dinners, running from October 30 to November 12.

tool_args.label: 20-Year Needs Assessment capital investments for Metro-North

payload.claim_text: Major capital investments identified for Metro-North include reconstruction of Grand Central Train Shed, Park Avenue Tunnel and Park Avenue Viaduct, as well as flood mitigation and resiliency measures on the Hudson line and structural maintenance at 19 Harlem Line stations.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: Among the major capital investments identified by the study for Metro-North are the reconstruction of Grand Central Train Shed, Park Avenue Tunnel and Park Avenue Viaduct, as well as flood mitigation and resiliency measures on the Hudson line and structural maintenance at 19 Harlem Line stations.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: 20-Year Needs Assessment capital investments for LIRR

payload.claim_text: LIRR needs include rehabilitation of aging Atlantic Avenue Tunnel, replacement or rehabilitation of several bridges and trestles, rolling stock upgrades, completion of Centralized Train Control, and signal system upgrades along some 50 miles of right-of-way.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: In the Long Island Rail Road portion of the MTA 20-Year Needs Assessment, several elements of our system and infrastructure were also mentioned—including the need to rehabilitate the aging Atlantic Avenue Tunnel along with the replacement or rehabilitation of several bridges and trestles, rolling stock upgrades, completion of our Centralized Train Control location and upgrades to signal systems along some 50 miles of right-of-way.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
